hero.subtitle: Full-scale delivery operations platform
hero.title: Deliver Without Limits
hero.description: Trasealio connects merchants, dispatchers, drivers, recipients, and finance into one unified workflow — built on a secure multi-tenant SaaS foundation ready for enterprise scale.

hero2.title: Run Your Entire Delivery Operation From One Platform
hero2.description: Trasealio gives you the structure to move faster, the intelligence to operate smarter, and the platform to scale bigger — without losing control.

hero3.title: Scale Deliveries. Automate Operations.
hero3.description: Every action triggers the next step, every status is traceable, every delivery is accountable, and every transaction is measurable.

hero4.slide1Title: One Platform for Your Entire Delivery Lifecycle
hero4.slide1Desc: From merchant onboarding to proof of delivery and financial settlement — Trasealio handles every step with clarity and automation.
hero4.slide2Title: Dispatch Control That Feels Like a Command Center
hero4.slide2Desc: Assign drivers, optimize routes, monitor operations live, and trigger batch actions — all from one powerful dashboard.
hero4.slide3Desc: Route optimization, real-time tracking, and intelligent automation that saves time, fuel, and reduces failed deliveries.

hero5.title: We build logistics technology that grows delivery businesses
hero5.description: Trasealio is not just tracking software — it's the operating system for modern delivery companies that demand speed, accountability, and scale.

hero6.description: Trasealio connects every part of your delivery operation — from order creation to final settlement — into one powerful, unified platform.

hero8.slide3Title: The Perfect Solution for Growing Delivery Businesses
hero8.slideDesc: Trasealio gives dispatch teams the power to operate at high volume without losing visibility — turning software into operational advantage.

features.subtitle: Platform Features
features.title: Everything you need to run delivery operations at scale
features.description: Trasealio covers the entire delivery reality — from merchant self-service to dispatch control, route optimization, driver management, and financial settlement.
features.item1Desc: Complete merchant self-service: create shipments, upload via CSV, generate shipping labels, track orders, manage invoices and COD summaries.
features.item2Desc: Assign drivers, manage workloads in real time, run pickups, optimize delivery sequences, and monitor operations live through maps and timelines.
features.item3Desc: Intelligent stop sequencing with before/after comparison, persisted route plans, driver next-stop guidance, and one-tap navigation.

portfolio.subtitle: Platform Overview
portfolio.title: See Trasealio in action across every module
portfolio.description: From merchant dashboards to driver apps and finance tools — explore how Trasealio unifies every part of your delivery operations.

skill.subtitle: Platform Performance
skill.title: Trusted by delivery businesses worldwide
skill.description: Trasealio powers high-volume delivery operations with enterprise-grade reliability, helping businesses deliver faster and settle smarter.
skill.creativeUserDesc: Millions of deliveries managed through Trasealio — from order creation to proof of delivery and financial settlement.
skill.successfulRateDesc: Enterprise-grade infrastructure ensures your delivery operations run smoothly around the clock without interruption.

feedback.subtitle: What Our Clients Say
feedback.title: Trusted by delivery businesses across the region
feedback.description: Hear from merchants, logistics companies, and fleet operators who transformed their operations with Trasealio.
feedback.member1Quote: Trasealio transformed our entire delivery operation. We went from scattered spreadsheets and phone calls to a unified command center. Our dispatch team now handles 3x the volume with complete visibility over every driver and every delivery.
feedback.member2Quote: The merchant self-service portal alone saved us dozens of support hours per week. Our merchants can now create shipments, print labels, and track their orders without calling us. Trasealio made us a true multi-merchant platform.
feedback.member3Quote: Route optimization was a game-changer. We reduced fuel costs by 22% and failed deliveries by 35% in the first month. The driver app is intuitive and our team adopted it immediately — no training needed.
feedback.member4Quote: Finally, a delivery platform that understands finance. COD settlement, automated invoicing, wallet management — Trasealio doesn't stop at delivered. It continues through paid, settled, reconciled, and reported. Exactly what we needed.
